Genererad berättande text: StructureDefinition inera-ehds-lm-maternity-medical-history

NamnFlaggorKard.TypBeskrivning & begränsningar
inera-ehds-lm-maternity-medical-history 0..*BaseGetMaternityMedicalHistory
Instanser av denna logiska modell kan vara mål för en Reference
maternityMedicalRecord 0..*BackboneElementMödravårdsjournalpost
maternityMedicalRecordHeader 1..1BackboneElementPatientSummaryHeader
documentId 1..1stringDokumentets unika id
sourceSystemHSAId 1..1IdentifierKällsystemets HSA-id
documentTitle 0..1stringDokumentets titel
documentTime 1..1instantDokumentets tidpunkt
patientId 1..1IdentifierPatientens id
value 1..1stringPatientens personnummer/samordningsnummer
system 1..1uriOID för identifierartyp (t.ex. urn:oid:1.2.752.129.2.1.3.1)
accountableHealthcareProfessional 1..1BackboneElementAnsvarig hälso- och sjukvårdspersonal
authorTime 1..1instantTidpunkt
healthcareProfessionalHSAId 1..1IdentifierHSA-id (obligatorisk i mödrahälsovård)
healthcareProfessionalName 0..1stringNamn
healthcareProfessionalRoleCode 0..1CodeableConceptYrkesroll
healthcareProfessionalOrgUnit 0..1BackboneElementOrganisationsenhet
orgUnitHSAId 1..1IdentifierOrgUnit HSA-id
orgUnitName 1..1stringOrgUnit namn
orgUnitTelecom 0..1stringTelefon
orgUnitEmail 0..1stringE-post
orgUnitAddress 0..1stringAdress
orgUnitLocation 0..1stringPlats
healthcareProfessionalCareUnitHSAId 1..1IdentifierVårdenhetens HSA-id
healthcareProfessionalCareGiverHSAId 1..1IdentifierVårdgivarens HSA-id
legalAuthenticator 0..1BackboneElementJuridiskt ansvarig
signatureTime 1..1instantSigneringstidpunkt
legalAuthenticatorHSAId 0..1IdentifierHSA-id
legalAuthenticatorName 0..1stringNamn
approvedForPatient 1..1booleanGodkänd för patientvisning
careContactId 0..1stringVårdkontaktid
maternityMedicalRecordBody 1..1BackboneElementMödravårdsjournaldata
registrationRecord 0..1BackboneElementInskrivningsuppgifter
lastMenstrualPeriod 0..1dateSista menstruationsdag
indicationPregnancy 0..1dateGraviditetsindikation datum
contraceptiveDiscontinued 0..1dateDatum p-medel avslutades
expectedDayOfDeliveryFromLastMenstrualPeriod 0..1dateBeräknat förlossningsdatum (LMP)
expectedDayOfDeliveryFromUltrasoundScan 0..1dateBeräknat förlossningsdatum (UL)
expectedDayOfDeliveryFromEmbryonicTransfer 0..1dateBeräknat förlossningsdatum (embryoöverföring)
length 0..1QuantityKroppslängd (cm)
weight 0..1QuantityKroppsvikt (kg)
bodyMassIndex 0..1QuantityBMI
infertility 0..1decimalInfertilitet (år)
previousGravidityAndParity 0..*BackboneElementTidigare graviditeter
year 1..1integerÅr
month 1..1integerMånad
delivery 0..1CodeableConceptFörlossningssätt
healthcareFacility 0..1stringVårdinrättning
progress 0..1stringFörlopp
sex 0..1CodeableConceptBarnets kön
weightOfChild 0..1QuantityBarnets vikt
gestation 0..1integerGestationsålder (veckor)
diseasesThrombosis 0..1booleanTrombos
diseasesEndocineDiseases 0..1booleanEndokrina sjukdomar
diseasesRecurrentUrinaryTractInfections 0..1booleanRecidiverande urinvägsinfektioner
diseasesDiabetesMellitus 0..1booleanDiabetes mellitus
medicationDuringPregnacy 0..*BackboneElementLäkemedel under graviditet
medicament 1..1stringLäkemedel
dosage 0..1stringDosering
assessmentAtFirstContactStandardCare 0..1booleanBedömning vid inskrivning standardvård
pregnancyCheckupRecord 0..1BackboneElementGraviditetskontroll
completeWeeksOfGestation 0..1integerKompletta graviditetsveckor
weight 0..1QuantityVikt
symphysisFundalHeight 0..1QuantitySymfondusmått (cm)
haemoglobin 0..1QuantityHemoglobin
bloodPressureSystolic 0..1QuantitySystoliskt blodtryck
bloodPressureDiastolic 0..1QuantityDiastoliskt blodtryck
proteinuria 0..1QuantityProteinuri
glycosuria 0..1QuantityGlykosuri
fetalPosition 0..*CodeableConceptFosterläge
fetalPresentation 0..*CodeableConceptFosterpresentation
fetalHeartRate 0..*QuantityFosterhjärtfrekvens
typeOfLeave 0..*CodeableConceptTyp av ledighet
medicationSinceRegistration 0..*BackboneElementLäkemedel sedan inskrivning
medicament 1..1stringLäkemedel
dosage 0..1stringDosering
postDeliveryRecord 0..1BackboneElementEftervård
motherPostDeliveryRecord 1..1BackboneElementModerns eftervård
breastfeeding 0..1booleanAmning
bloodPressureSystolic 0..1QuantitySystoliskt blodtryck
bloodPressureDiastolic 0..1QuantityDiastoliskt blodtryck
haemoglobin 0..1QuantityHemoglobin
bodyTemperature 0..1QuantityKroppstemperatur
scarsOK 0..1booleanÄrr OK
sutureRemoved 0..1booleanSuturer borttagna
perineumComfortable 0..1booleanPerineum OK
vulvaVaginaPortioOK 0..1booleanVulva/vagina/portio OK
uterusContracted 0..1booleanUterus kontraherad
uterusNote 0..1stringUterusnotering
childPostDeliveryRecord 1..*BackboneElementBarnets eftervård
ordinalNumber 1..1integerLöpnummer för barn (vid flerbörd)
weight 0..1QuantityBarnets vikt
apgarScore1 0..1integerApgar-poäng 1 min
apgarScore5 0..1integerApgar-poäng 5 min
apgarScore10 0..1integerApgar-poäng 10 min

Dokumentation för detta format

name: IneraEHDSLMMaternityMedicalHistory
title: GetMaternityMedicalHistory
description:
Logisk modell för tjänstekontraktet GetMaternityMedicalHistory
(RIV-TA urn:riv:clinicalprocess:healthcond:actoutcome:GetMaternityMedicalHistory:2).
Representerar responsens informationsstruktur — mödravårdsjournal för en patient.

element.definition:
Logisk modell för tjänstekontraktet GetMaternityMedicalHistory
(RIV-TA urn:riv:clinicalprocess:healthcond:actoutcome:GetMaternityMedicalHistory:2).
Representerar responsens informationsstruktur — mödravårdsjournal för en patient.

element.short: usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
element.comment: Applications can assume that an identifier is permanent unless it explicitly says that it is temporary.
element.requirements: Allows the appropriate identifier for a particular context of use to be selected from among a set of identifiers.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

element.isModifierReason: This is labeled as "Is Modifier" because applications should not mistake a temporary id for a permanent one.

binding.description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

element.definition: A coded type for the identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.
element.comment: This element deals only with general categories of identifiers.  It SHOULD not be used for codes that correspond 1..1 with the Identifier.system. Some identifiers may fall into multiple categories due to common usage.   Where the system is known, a type is unnecessary because the type is always part of the system definition. However systems often need to handle identifiers where the system is not known. There is not a 1:1 relationship between type and system, since many different systems have the same type.
element.requirements: Allows users to make use of identifiers when the identifier system is not known.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

binding.description: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

element.comment: Identifier.system is always case sensitive.
element.requirements: There are many sets  of identifiers.  To perform matching of two identifiers, we need to know what set we're dealing with. The system identifies a particular set of unique identifiers.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

element.comment: If the value is a full URI, then the system SHALL be urn:ietf:rfc:3986.  The value's primary purpose is computational mapping.  As a result, it may be normalized for comparison purposes (e.g. removing non-significant whitespace, dashes, etc.)  A value formatted for human display can be conveyed using the [Rendered Value extension](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-rendered-value.html). Identifier.value is to be treated as case sensitive unless knowledge of the Identifier.system allows the processer to be confident that non-case-sensitive processing is safe.
